title: Tons of Money
writer: Will Evans, Lucita Squier, Arthur Valentine
actors: Leslie Henson, Flora le Breton, Mary Brough
plot: Aubrey Allington is an inventor with enormous ingenuity at dodging debts; but tradesmen all around are getting wise to his tricks. Just as he is about to resort to the desperate plan of inviting all his creditors to dinner and blo...
